mapper.select: select fi.id, fi.type, fi.name, fi.icon from apartment_facility as af left join facility_info as fi on af.facility_id = fi.id and fi.is_deleted = 0 where af.apartment_id = #{id} and af.is_deleted = 0

select MIN(ri.rent) as "minRent", ai.id as id from room_info as ri join apartment_info as ai on ri.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 and ai.is_release = 1 and ai.id = #{id} where ri.is_deleted = 0 and ri.is_release = 1
select name, url from graph_info where item_type = 1 and item_id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select li.id, li.type, li.name from apartment_label as al join label_info as li on al.label_id = li.id and li.is_deleted = 0 where al.apartment_id = #{id} and al.is_deleted = 0
